title: Conveyor Agent Usage
description: A structured cost/latency record for a single real agent run (R2a cost instrumentation). The canonical source is the adapter's RawRunResult.metadata (tokens/cost_usd_estimated/latency_ms); this is the durable projection. cost_usd is an ESTIMATE (Codex reports tokens, not dollars; ~$0 marginal under a subscription) — tokens are the real signal. `arm`/`task` are present when the run is part of a lift duel.
